footer.tagline: Building the future of coupon infrastructure through the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol.

hero.title: THE INTELLIGENT EXCHANGE FOR DIGITAL VALUE
hero.subtitle: Connecting Merchants and Distributors Through Secure, Tokenized Digital Commerce
hero.description: Mezzofy is the AI-powered, tokenized protocol that connects coupon/voucher Supply directly to Demand — ensuring fraud-free validation and maximized redemption worldwide.

protocol.title: The Future of Promotions is Secure, Standardized, and Tokenized
protocol.description: Traditional digital promotions are failing due to fragmentation, high costs, and security risks. We eliminate the obsolete SaaS model and replace it with a high-liquidity, high-performance Exchange Protocol.

network.title: From Tool to Network
network.description: We focus on network effects and secure settlement, not just features. Build real value through connections.

ai.title: AI-Native Infrastructure
ai.description: Our data is machine-readable, making us the standard interface for the next generation of autonomous AI shopping agents.

security.title: Unrivaled Security
security.description: Every promotion is standardized into the Mezzofy Coupon Standard, a proprietary protocol that guarantees unique, fraud-proof digital assets.

ecosystem.title: From Vision to Products: The Mezzofy Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: Our Exchange Protocol powers a complete suite of products designed to execute our infrastructure vision across the entire coupon lifecycle
ecosystem.diagram: [Visual Diagram: Product Ecosystem Layers showing the relationship between Core Infrastructure → Distribution Channels → Consumer Experience → Strategy]

coreInfra.title: Core Infrastructure
coreInfra.description: Foundation products for creating and exchanging coupons

retail.title: Retail Excellence
retail.description: For multi-location retailers with physical + digital presence

revenue.title: Revenue Maximizer
revenue.description: For merchants selling coupons as revenue stream

partner.title: Distribution Partner
partner.description: For loyalty programs, HR platforms, channel partners

enterprise.title: Enterprise Complete
enterprise.description: For large enterprises with complex needs

merchants.title: For Merchants: Turn Coupon Liabilities into High-Performing Digital Assets
merchants.description: Join the Exchange for free and gain instant access to global distribution channels. You only pay when a sale is successfully made and redeemed.

benefit1.title: Zero Upfront Cost
benefit1.description: Free Onboarding. Pay only a small transaction fee upon final, successful redemption (Performance-Based Model).

benefit2.title: Flexible Control
benefit2.description: Use our Bridge API with your existing CMS, or utilize our free Mezzofy CMS products. You dictate the rules, we handle the security.

benefit3.title: Global Footprint
benefit3.description: Instantly expose your inventory to our B2B marketplace, channel partners, and the high-volume NFC Network for physical retail engagement.

benefit4.title: Future-Proof Asset
benefit4.description: Your promotions are tokenized, opening up possibilities for secondary markets and new financial instruments (RWA Linkage).

distributors.title: For Distributors & Partners: Access the World's Most Secure, High-Intent Coupon Inventory
distributors.description: Enhance your loyalty program, banking app, or corporate HR portal with real-time, verified deals without the financial risk of inventory purchasing.

benefit1.title: Risk-Free Integration
benefit1.description: Free to Access and seamless integration via the Bridge API. Instantly pull standardized deals into your platform.

benefit2.title: Cash Flow Protection
benefit2.description: Our Consignment Settlement Model requires only a partial upfront deposit for Large Enterprises, with the bulk of the charge processed only on verified redemption.

benefit3.title: Standardized Quality
benefit3.description: All coupons adhere to the Mezzofy Coupon Standard, eliminating fraud risk and ensuring a perfect redemption experience for your customers.

benefit4.title: Targeted Distribution
benefit4.description: Consume inventory tailored for your channels: Loyalty & HR for internal benefits, and the AI Agent API for programmatic consumption.

tokenization.title: The Exchange Core: Where Commerce Meets Security
tokenization.description: Our Layer 2 Core transforms simple promotional codes into unique, trackable digital assets.

component1.title: Standardization & Tokenization
component1.description: Every voucher is tokenized upon ingestion, converting it into a secure, single-use digital asset (NFT/fungible instrument).

component2.title: Asset Linkage
component2.description: We create the foundation for linking these assets to Real-World Assets (RWA), expanding the digital coupon market into the rapidly growing Web3/DeFi asset space.

component3.title: Clearinghouse
component3.description: The core manages all consignment, financial reconciliation, and fraudless validation.

cta.title: Ready to power the future of commerce?
cta.description: Whether you are a merchant looking for maximum performance or a distributor seeking high-intent inventory, the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol is the indispensable infrastructure you need.

hero.title: ABOUT COMPANY
hero.subtitle: Connecting Businesses and Customers Through The Power of Smart Couponing

nameOrigin.title: Name Origin
nameOrigin.description: 'Mezzo' (Italian for 'medium') combined with '-fy' (meaning 'for you')—reflecting our dedication to linking enterprises with patrons through cutting-edge couponing solutions.

corePurpose.title: Core Purpose
corePurpose.description: Rather than simply developing digital coupons or applications, Mezzofy positions itself as a pioneer in COUPONS MARKETING infrastructure, making it easy to create, share, redeem, and measure.

keyObjectives.title: Key Objectives
keyObjectives.description: We aim to elevate spirits, forge meaningful connections, unleash creativity, and enable focus, making life more vibrant through the joy of sharing by facilitating interactions between merchants and consumers.

brands.title: Trusted by Leading Brands
brands.description: Mezzofy serves numerous multinational brands across retail, beauty, hospitality, finance, and entertainment sectors.

cta.title: Ready to power the future of commerce?
cta.description: Whether you are a merchant looking for maximum performance or a distributor seeking high-intent inventory, the Mezzofy Exchange Protocol is the indispensable infrastructure you need.

nfcParknshop.title: NFC Coupons at ParknShop: A Tap-to-Get Success Story
nfcParknshop.description: Streamlined promotional processes for FMCG brands partnering with ParknShop through NFC technology, eliminating coordination complexity.

treasureGlobal.title: Mezzofy Partners with Treasure Global
treasureGlobal.description: Strategic partnership with Treasure Global Inc. to accelerate digital coupon expansion in Malaysia, projecting USD2-4 million in recurring annual revenue.

eCouponsPreference.title: 60% of Consumers Prefer E-Coupons
eCouponsPreference.description: 60% of consumers prefer e-coupons, signaling a major shift in shopping behaviors. Digital coupons with NFC and AI are transforming retail.

environmentalExcellence.title: HK Awards for Environmental Excellence
environmentalExcellence.description: Cut costs and save trees with digital coupons. Over 136 billion paper coupons destroy 5 million trees annually. Go digital to reduce expenses by 70%.

techappleInnovation.title: Mezzofy Recognized as 3-Star SME in 2024 CII
techappleInnovation.description: TechApple features Mezzofy's recognition as 3-Star SME in the 2024 Corporate Innovation Index for digital couponing contributions.

dualEsgAwards.title: Dual Awards at ESG Forum 2024
dualEsgAwards.description: Mezzofy honored with Outstanding ESG Enterprise Award and Sustainable Development Enterprise Certificate at the ESG Forum 2024.

fundingAnnouncement.title: USD 2 Million Pre-Series A Funding Round
fundingAnnouncement.description: Mezzofy raised USD 2 million Pre-series A funding led by Isola Capital to support global expansion and web3 product development.

holidayGuide.title: Holiday Season Coupon Guide
holidayGuide.description: Master the last-minute holiday sales surge with swift coupon solutions. Holiday retail sales reached $943-960 billion in 2022.

smartRetail.title: Tech-led Smart Retail
smartRetail.description: NFC technology transforms retail dynamics. Research shows 73% of respondents make spontaneous purchases, with average monthly impulse spending exceeding $314.

cioworldFeature.title: Transforming Coupons for a Greener Future
cioworldFeature.description: TheCIOWorld features Mezzofy's innovative NFC tap-to-get coupons and integrated wallet functionality for sustainable digital marketing.

ejtech300m.title: 300M Digital Coupons Across APAC
ejtech300m.description: EJTech highlights Mezzofy's cloud platform distributing over 300 million digital coupons across Asia-Pacific, transforming customer engagement.

edigestLeading.title: Asia-Pacific's Leading Digital Coupon Solution
edigestLeading.description: eDigest exclusive feature on Mezzofy as a leading digital coupon platform transforming coupon management across Asia-Pacific.

forbesDickyYin.title: Forbes Recognizes Dicky Yin for Leadership
forbesDickyYin.description: Forbes China features Mezzofy CEO Dicky Yin for outstanding leadership in innovation, transforming the digital coupon sector.

hotelTechInnovation.title: Why Tech Innovation is Key to Hotel Success
hotelTechInnovation.description: 67% of travelers expect personalized experiences. Hotels must adopt NFC, chatbots, and AI-driven personalization to boost revenue and loyalty.

hero.subtitle: Unlock Sustainable Growth through Strategic Investment and Collaborative Partnership Opportunities

intro.label: INVESTOR
intro.title: Join Us in Revolutionizing Digital Commerce
intro.description: At Mezzofy, we are redefining how businesses engage customers through our innovative digital couponing solutions. As we continue to expand and innovate, we invite like-minded investors and partners to explore opportunities to collaborate with us. Together, let's revolutionize the way businesses connect with customers and unlock new growth possibilities.

highlight2.title: Proven Technology

highlight3.title: Blue-Chip Partnerships

highlight4.title: Global Expansion

hero.label: COUPON MARKETPLACE
hero.title: THE GLOBAL EXCHANGE HUB FOR DIGITAL COUPONS
hero.description: The only secure peer-to-peer coupon exchange enabling B2B, B2C, and C2C transactions. Built on tokenization technology to create a secondary market for digital promotions with fraud-proof validation.

exchange.title: The Coupon Exchange Protocol
exchange.description: Traditional digital promotions are failing due to fragmentation, high costs, and security risks. Mezzofy eliminates the obsolete model and replaces it with a high-liquidity, high-performance Exchange Protocol.

network.title: From Tool to Network
network.description: We focus on network effects and secure settlement, not just features. Build real value through connections across the global marketplace.

security.title: Unrivaled Security
security.description: Every promotion is standardized into the Mezzofy Coupon Standard, a proprietary protocol that guarantees unique, fraud-proof digital assets.

ai.title: AI-Native Infrastructure
ai.description: Our data is machine-readable, making us the standard interface for the next generation of autonomous AI shopping agents.

models.title: Three Marketplace Models, One Platform
models.subtitle: Mezzofy powers coupon exchange across all transaction types, creating a comprehensive ecosystem for digital promotion distribution

b2b.title: Business to Business
b2b.description: Mezzofy serves as the central exchange hub connecting merchants with distributors, resellers, and channel partners. List your coupon inventory and gain instant access to global distribution networks.
b2b.benefit1: Wholesale Distribution: Sell coupon inventory in bulk to distributors and resellers
b2b.benefit2: Channel Partner Network: Connect with marketing platforms, loyalty programs, and affiliate networks
b2b.benefit3: Cross-Promotion Opportunities: Trade inventory with complementary businesses for mutual benefit
b2b.benefit4: Transparent Pricing: Real-time market pricing with automated settlement and commission tracking
b2b.cardDescription: Turn coupon liabilities into high-performing digital assets with global reach

b2c.title: Business to Consumer
b2c.description: Enable direct customer engagement through secure, personalized promotional campaigns that drive measurable results.
b2c.benefit1: Direct Distribution: Push coupons to customers via email, SMS, social media, and mobile apps
b2c.benefit2: Personalized Campaigns: Target specific customer segments with tailored promotional offers
b2c.benefit3: Real-Time Analytics: Track redemption rates, customer engagement, and campaign performance
b2c.benefit4: Multi-Channel Reach: Distribute through marketplaces, e-commerce platforms, and retail partners
b2c.cardDescription: Direct customer engagement with personalized promotional campaigns

c2c.title: Consumer to Consumer
c2c.description: The world's first secure peer-to-peer coupon exchange marketplace. Transfer, gift, or trade coupons with fraud-proof validation.
c2c.benefit1: Transferable Coupons: Gift or transfer coupons to friends and family with secure validation
c2c.benefit2: Secondary Marketplace: Trade or sell unused coupons to maximize value and reduce waste
c2c.benefit3: Fraud Prevention: Blockchain-inspired tokenization ensures each coupon is unique and valid
c2c.benefit4: Increased Redemption: Unused coupons find new owners, driving actual business value for merchants
c2c.cardDescription: Peer-to-peer coupon exchange with fraud-proof validation

hero.label: COUPON NFC
hero.title: INSTANT COUPON DISTRIBUTION WITH NFC TECHNOLOGY

step5.title: Redeem

q1.question: How long does account activation take?
q1.answer: Account activation typically takes 24-48 hours after signup. Once activated, you can immediately start creating and distributing coupons through your NFC tags.

q2.question: How are coupons counted?
q2.answer: Each unique coupon instance distributed to a customer counts toward your monthly or annual limit. Multiple taps by the same customer for the same coupon only count once.

q3.question: Can I modify offers after distribution?
q3.answer: Yes! Our platform allows real-time modifications to active campaigns. You can update offer terms, extend expiration dates, void coupons, or refine targeting parameters at any time through the dashboard.

q4.question: What happens if I exceed my coupon limit?
q4.answer: If you approach your coupon limit, we'll notify you in advance. You can either upgrade to a higher plan or purchase additional coupon credits. There's no service interruption - excess usage is billed at a competitive per-coupon rate.

header.title: 🎫 How to Use Mezzofy NFC Coupons
header.subtitle: Your complete guide to tapping, claiming, and redeeming digital coupons

intro.title: Welcome to the Future of Coupons!
intro.description: Mezzofy's NFC technology makes saving money easier than ever. Simply tap your phone on any Mezzofy NFC sticker or scan a QR code to unlock exclusive deals. Follow this simple guide to start saving today!

step1.title: Enable NFC on Your Phone
step1.description: Before you can tap and save, make sure NFC is enabled on your smartphone:
step1.iphone: iPhone: NFC is always on for iPhone 7 and newer. No setup needed!
step1.android: Android: Go to Settings → Connected Devices → Connection Preferences → NFC → Turn ON

step2.title: Tap Your Phone
step2.description: Hold the back of your smartphone close to the NFC sticker (within 1-2 inches). You'll feel a vibration or hear a sound confirming the tap. Your phone will automatically open the coupon link in your browser.

step3.title: View Coupon Details
step3.description: Once the page loads, you'll see:

optionA.heading: Option A: With Mezzofy Coupon Clipper App (Recommended)
optionA.intro: For the best experience, download the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app:
optionA.item1: Seamless Collection: Tap any NFC coupon and it automatically saves to your app
optionA.item2: No Personal Data Required: Start using immediately without sign-up
optionA.item3: All Coupons in One Place: Easy access to your entire coupon collection
optionA.item4: Instant Redemption: Show coupons directly from the app at checkout

optionB.heading: Option B: Without the App (Browser-Based)
optionB.intro: Don't have the app yet? No problem! When you tap an NFC coupon:
optionB.item1: The coupon details page launches immediately in your browser
optionB.item2: View and use the coupon right away at checkout
optionB.item3: Save Options: Optionally save to Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, or Samsung Wallet
optionB.item4: Or Download the App: A convenient link to download Mezzofy Coupon Clipper for future use

step5.title: Redeem at Checkout
step5.description: When you're ready to use your coupon:
step5.item1: Open your Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app or access the coupon from your device wallet
step5.item2: Select the coupon you want to use
step5.item3: Show the QR code or barcode to the merchant's scanner at checkout

features.title: ✨ Key Features of Mezzofy NFC Coupons
features.feature1: Instant Access: No need to download apps before tapping – works directly in your browser
features.feature2: Privacy-Friendly: The Coupon Clipper app requires no personal data to use
features.feature3: Multiple Wallet Options: Save to Mezzofy, Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, or Samsung Wallet
features.feature4: No Printing Required: Completely paperless and eco-friendly
features.feature5: Real-Time Updates: Get notifications about new deals and expiring coupons
features.feature6: Multi-Portal Support: Works with B2C, C2C, and partner merchant systems

tips.title: 💡 Pro Tips for Maximum Savings
tips.tip1: Download the App: Get the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper for the fastest, most seamless experience
tips.tip2: Enable Notifications: Never miss a deal – allow Mezzofy to send you alerts about new coupons and expiring offers
tips.tip3: Check Expiration Dates: Use your coupons before they expire to maximize your savings
tips.tip4: Stack Offers: Some merchants allow you to combine multiple coupons – check the terms!
tips.tip5: Share with Friends: Use our C2C portal to trade or gift coupons you won't use
tips.tip6: Follow Favorite Merchants: Get exclusive early access to their promotions

q1.question: Q: Do I need to download an app to use NFC coupons?
q1.answer: A: No! You can tap and view coupons directly in your mobile browser. However, downloading the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app provides the best experience with automatic coupon collection and no personal data required.

q2.question: Q: What if my phone doesn't have NFC?
q2.answer: A: No problem! Every NFC coupon also has a QR code option. Simply open your camera app and scan the QR code to access the same coupon.

q3.question: Q: Does the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app require personal information?
q3.answer: A: No! You can start using the app immediately without providing any personal data. It's designed for privacy and convenience.

q4.question: Q: Can I use a coupon multiple times?
q4.answer: A: It depends on the coupon terms. Most coupons are single-use, but some promotional offers allow multiple redemptions. Check the coupon details for specific information.

q5.question: Q: What happens if I tap a coupon but don't save it?
q5.answer: A: Without the app, you can still use the coupon immediately from the browser page. You can also save it to your device wallet (Apple, Google, or Samsung) or tap the same NFC sticker again later.

q6.question: Q: Can I transfer my coupons to someone else?
q6.answer: A: Yes! Through our C2C (Customer-to-Customer) portal, you can trade, gift, or sell unused coupons to other Mezzofy users.

q7.question: Q: What if the coupon doesn't work at checkout?
q7.answer: A: First, check that the coupon hasn't expired and that you're using it at a participating merchant. If issues persist, contact the merchant or Mezzofy customer support for assistance.

q8.question: Q: Which wallet should I use to save coupons?
q8.answer: A: We recommend the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app for the best experience. However, you can also save to Apple Wallet (iPhone), Google Wallet (Android), or Samsung Wallet depending on your device.

support.title: Need More Help?
support.description: Our customer support team is here to assist you!
support.helpCenter: Visit our Help Center for more guides and tutorials

eCouponsPreference.title: 60% of Consumers Prefer E-Coupons: What This Means for Retail in the Digital Age

paragraphs.rise: The statistic that "60% of consumers prefer e-coupons" signals a transformative shift in shopping behaviors. Digital coupons have become critical engagement tools for businesses, particularly when enhanced with NFC and AI technologies. This preference reflects consumers' desire for convenience, speed, and personalized shopping experiences in an increasingly digital retail landscape.
paragraphs.footTraffic: Research indicates that "77% of shoppers are more likely to visit stores offering discounts," underscoring how coupon-driven promotions drive both foot traffic and online sales. This compelling statistic demonstrates that consumers actively seek out retailers with attractive promotional offers, making digital coupons a critical tool for capturing market share and increasing store visits.
paragraphs.nfc: NFC technology allows consumers to tap their phones at checkout for instant coupon redemption, eliminating friction and creating seamless shopping experiences. By removing the need to present physical vouchers or manually enter codes, NFC-enabled digital coupons significantly reduce transaction time and improve customer satisfaction at the point of sale.
paragraphs.ai: AI enhances digital coupons by delivering personalized deals based on customer behavior patterns. Machine learning algorithms analyze purchase history, preferences, and shopping habits to create targeted offers that resonate with individual consumers, dramatically improving redemption rates and customer lifetime value.
paragraphs.location: GPS-enabled digital coupons represent another powerful retail strategy with time-sensitive offers delivered to customers near physical locations. This geofencing capability enables retailers to engage consumers at the moment of decision-making, dramatically increasing the likelihood of redemption and impulse purchases.

environmentalExcellence.title: HK Awards for Environmental Excellence - Cut Costs & Save Trees with Digital Coupons

headings.impact: The Environmental Impact of Paper Coupons

paragraphs.impact: Over 136 billion paper coupons are distributed globally annually, destroying approximately 5 million trees. Paper production ranks as the third-largest industrial polluter of air, water, and soil. The environmental cost of traditional coupon systems extends far beyond simple logistics—it represents a significant burden on our planet's natural resources and ecosystems.
paragraphs.waste: More than 90% of paper coupons go unredeemed and end up in landfills, creating massive waste problems in communities worldwide. This staggering waste rate not only represents lost resources but also contributes to environmental degradation through landfill methane emissions and persistent pollution.
paragraphs.businessIntro: Digital coupon solutions offer significant business advantages alongside environmental benefits:
paragraphs.demand: Digital coupon adoption aligns with ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) principles—73% of global consumers would modify consumption to minimize environmental damage. This consumer preference represents both an ethical imperative and a compelling business opportunity for forward-thinking retailers.
paragraphs.implementationIntro: Organizations looking to transition to digital coupon solutions should follow these key steps:

benefits.cost: Reduce marketing expenses by up to 70%

holidayGuide.title: Holiday Season Coupon Guide - Mastering the Last-Minute Holiday Sales Surge

headings.strategies: Digital Coupon Strategies for Holiday Success

paragraphs.opportunity: Holiday retail sales soared to $943-960 billion during 2022 according to the National Retail Federation (NRF). These staggering figures underscore the critical importance of maximizing sales during the holiday season—a period when consumer spending reaches its annual peak and opportunities abound for strategic retailers.
paragraphs.misconception: The guide addresses a common misconception among retailers that the window for engaging last-minute shoppers has closed. Many retailers mistakenly believe that by mid-December, they've already captured their holiday audience. However, substantial opportunities remain during the final weeks before Christmas to capture consumer spending from procrastinating shoppers and those seeking last-minute gift solutions.
paragraphs.capitalizing: Significant consumer segments actively shop in the final days before the holidays, seeking gifts, stocking up on essentials, or finding last-minute entertainment options. Strategic retailers who implement targeted coupon campaigns during this critical window can capture substantial market share and maximize holiday season revenue.
paragraphs.strategies: The piece explores strategies for executing effective promotional campaigns during the holiday period with particular focus on digital coupon solutions. Modern retailers have access to sophisticated tools that enable rapid deployment of promotional offers—allowing them to respond dynamically to consumer demand and shopping patterns.
paragraphs.tacticsIntro: Retailers can employ swift and strategic marketing tactics to maximize sales during the festive season's remaining timeframe. Key approaches include:
paragraphs.guidance: This comprehensive guide helps businesses navigate the crucial last-minute holiday shopping period with effective coupon strategies. By combining urgency marketing, personalization, and modern digital delivery channels, retailers can maximize revenue capture during the year's most commercially important season.

tactics.flash: Time-limited flash promotions targeting last-minute shoppers
tactics.personalized: Personalized digital coupons based on browsing and purchase history
tactics.mobile: Mobile-first coupon delivery via SMS and push notifications
tactics.nfc: NFC-enabled in-store promotions for instant redemption
tactics.bundled: Cross-category bundled offers to increase basket size

hotelTechInnovation.title: Why Tech Innovation is Key to Hotel Success

headings.nfc: NFC Technology for Enhanced Guest Experiences

paragraphs.challenges: The hotel and travel industry faces significant challenges including diminishing customer loyalty and fierce competition. In an increasingly crowded marketplace, hospitality businesses must differentiate themselves through superior experiences and innovative service delivery to retain customers and build long-term relationships.
paragraphs.travelers: Research indicates that 67% of travelers expect personalized experiences
paragraphs.nfc: NFC technology streamlines more than check-in—guests can tap smartphones to receive instant incentives like digital coupons for dining or local attractions, enhancing experiences while boosting revenue. This seamless integration of digital convenience with personalized offers creates memorable experiences that differentiate hotels from competitors.
paragraphs.chatbots: Chatbots enhance guest engagement by delivering location-based coupon offers from nearby stores and restaurants. Intelligent chatbot systems can proactively suggest dining, entertainment, and shopping opportunities based on guest preferences and location, creating additional revenue streams while improving guest satisfaction.
paragraphs.ai: AI-driven personalization creates tailored promotions analyzing previous stays and preferences. Machine learning algorithms examine historical guest data to anticipate needs and preferences, enabling hotels to deliver offers and recommendations that resonate with individual travelers and increase engagement rates.
paragraphs.urgency: The urgency for adaptation is critical: 80% of customers are more likely to choose brands offering personalized experiences.

dataSources.heading: Data Sources
dataSources.pwc: PwC Consumer Intelligence Series (75% data sharing willingness)

nfcParknshop.title: Mezzofy 助品牌設置優惠券到240 間百佳 NFC 標籤，全程代辦、無需協調

paragraphs.intro: For many FMCG and consumer goods brands, executing promotional activities through physical retail channels involves substantial coordination and procedural complexity.
paragraphs.challenges: The piece identifies typical obstacles: coordinating promotional details with retailers like ParknShop, designing physical coupon materials, arranging logistics and in-store placement, and tracking sales data.
paragraphs.service: Mezzofy now supports NFC tag promotions across ParknShop's 240 Hong Kong locations, offering a "one-stop" service where brands provide discount content while Mezzofy handles coupon creation, tag setup, and logistics—eliminating direct retailer coordination requirements.
paragraphs.applications: The service suits new product launches, limited-time promotions, market testing scenarios, and brands avoiding POS or paper-based operations.

benefits.costReduction: Per-coupon distribution costs fall below HK$0.20

smartRetail.title: Tech-led Smart Retail - NFC Coupons Driving Impulse Purchases

headings.strategies: Smart Strategies for NFC Coupon Success

paragraphs.landscape: The retail sector is experiencing significant shifts driven by technology and evolving consumer preferences. Modern retailers must embrace innovation to remain competitive and meet changing customer expectations in an increasingly digital marketplace.
paragraphs.nfc: NFC technology enables customers to receive digital coupons effortlessly through simple taps on in-store NFC tags, streamlining shopping and eliminating physical coupon management. This frictionless interaction creates seamless customer experiences while reducing operational overhead for retailers.
paragraphs.impulse: Research from Slickdeals indicates "three in four (73%) respondents make spontaneous purchases," with average monthly impulse spending increasing from $276 in 2021 to over $314 currently. This compelling data demonstrates the enormous value of capturing impulse purchase behavior through strategic in-store promotions and well-placed digital coupons.
paragraphs.strategiesIntro: Successful implementation of NFC coupon strategies requires careful attention to multiple key factors:
paragraphs.location: Positioning NFC coupons near checkout counters and in high-dwell areas maximizes visibility and engagement. Consumers in the decision-making phase respond most effectively to well-placed promotional offers.
paragraphs.value: Emphasizing the savings and benefits of offers helps drive redemption. Clear communication about discount amounts and value propositions encourages customer action.
paragraphs.merchandising: Logical grouping by category, season, or event creates coherent shopping experiences. Strategic product placement alongside targeted coupons improves cross-selling and basket size.
paragraphs.relevance: Precision targeting based on local events, weather, and customer behavior patterns ensures offers resonate with the right audience at the right time.
paragraphs.senses: Time-limited deals create urgency and stimulate customer responses. Limited-time offers leverage scarcity psychology to drive immediate purchase decisions.
paragraphs.transformative: Integrating NFC technology into digital coupon strategies represents transformative potential for retail. By combining convenient technology with strategic promotional thinking, retailers can dramatically improve sales performance, customer satisfaction, and competitive positioning.

cioworldFeature.title: TheCIOWorld Features Mezzofy: Transforming Coupons for a Greener Future

paragraphs.innovation: Mezzofy's innovative approach to digital couponing has been highlighted in CIOWorld. Dicky Ying, the company's leader, discusses how the organization transforms traditional couponing with environmentally conscious solutions.
paragraphs.technologies: The feature emphasizes Mezzofy's advanced technologies, specifically NFC tap-to-get coupons
paragraphs.redefining: The publication underscores how Mezzofy is redefining the landscape of sustainable digital marketing initiatives. The coverage showcases how technology innovation can drive both business success and environmental sustainability.

callout.heading: Read the Full Article
callout.text: Visit CIOWorld to learn more about Mezzofy's vision for eco-friendly digital coupons.

dualEsgAwards.title: Mezzofy Honored with Dual Awards at the ESG and Sustainable Development Forum 2024

paragraphs.awards: Mezzofy earned recognition at the "ESG and Sustainable Development Forum and Awards 2024," hosted by HK01 on September 27th. The company received two honors: the "Outstanding ESG Enterprise Award"
paragraphs.forum: Business leaders and sustainability experts convened to discuss ESG trends and integrating Sustainable Development Goals into operations. As a digital coupon platform, Mezzofy reduces environmental impact by replacing paper coupons with digital alternatives, thereby cutting paper waste.
paragraphs.commitment: The awards reinforce the company's commitment to environmental responsibility and leadership in sustainability. Mr. Tse Chin-wan, Hong Kong SAR Government's Secretary for Environment and Ecology, emphasized business importance in advancing sustainability initiatives.
paragraphs.future: Mezzofy continues developing solutions benefiting both environment and society. This achievement builds upon Mezzofy's earlier ESG certification.

edigestLeadingSolution.title: eDigest Exclusive: Asia-Pacific's Leading Digital Coupon Solution

headings.pioneering: Pioneering Digital Coupon Solutions in Asia-Pacific

paragraphs.pioneering: Mezzofy operates as "a leading digital coupon platform"
paragraphs.innovative: The platform distinguishes itself through accessibility and comprehensive features. Businesses can design and deploy digital coupons without requiring extensive technical expertise. The system accommodates multiple coupon formats, including discounts, gift vouchers, and promotional offers, supporting varied marketing approaches.
paragraphs.expanding: Mezzofy maintains operations across multiple Asia-Pacific countries and has facilitated issuance and management of over 300 million digital coupons
paragraphs.commitment: The company continues investing in research and development to introduce new features and integrations. By emphasizing innovation, Mezzofy provides businesses with contemporary tools for effective customer engagement and growth acceleration.

forbesDickyYin.title: Forbes China Recognizes Dicky Yin for Outstanding Leadership in Innovation

paragraphs.recognition: Mr. Dicky Yin, Chief Executive Officer of Mezzofy (Hong Kong) Limited, received recognition from Forbes China as a distinguished business leader.
paragraphs.philosophy: According to the article, Yin believes authentic leadership involves motivating associates to willingly align with organizational direction. He emphasizes building workplace culture that furnishes strategic direction and possibilities, viewing team members as collaborative partners advancing collective objectives.
paragraphs.stewardship: Under Yin's stewardship, Mezzofy has fundamentally transformed the digital coupon sector. The organization supplies retailers with adaptable tools to increase customer awareness and acceptance of digital coupon solutions.
paragraphs.reshaping: Through reshaping consumer patterns, the company is advancing sustainability within the industry. Forbes China's recognition highlights Yin's innovative approach to leadership and his commitment to creating positive change in both business practices and environmental impact.

callout.heading: Read the Full Forbes China Article
callout.text: Learn more about Dicky Yin's leadership philosophy and Mezzofy's mission.

fundingAnnouncement.title: Mezzofy Raised USD 2 Million Pre-Series A Funding Round

paragraphs.announcement: Mezzofy announced completion of a USD 2 million Pre-series A funding round
paragraphs.market: The global digital coupon market is projected to expand at a compound annual growth rate of 18.6%
paragraphs.brands: Nearly 100 Asian brands—including Maxim's, Starbucks, Shell, and Hyatt—utilize Mezzofy's platform. The Coupon-as-a-Service model enables integration with existing systems via API, reportedly cutting operational costs by over 87%.
paragraphs.management: Mezzofy manages approximately 400 million digital coupons

quote.text: "The growth of digital payments and e-commerce drives the rise of digital coupons. We addressed this by making digital coupons transferable."

techappleInnovationIndex.title: TechApple Features: Mezzofy Recognized as 3-Star SME in 2024 Corporate Innovation Index

paragraphs.innovation: The 2024 Corporate Innovation Index highlights accomplishments in innovation leadership and operational excellence, reinforcing Hong Kong's standing as a regional innovation center. Arup secured the top position, with Hang Seng Bank and Airport Authority Hong Kong following.
paragraphs.recognition: This marked the inaugural year SMEs received evaluation. Thirty-seven organizations achieved star ratings, with Mezzofy (Hong Kong) Limited earning three stars
paragraphs.collaboration: Backed by the Hong Kong government and CUHK's APIB, the initiative promotes cross-sector collaboration and digital transformation. It furnishes data for policymakers while recognizing enterprises propelling economic progress through originality and adaptability.
paragraphs.future: The index continues encouraging enterprises of all dimensions to adopt innovative approaches and strengthen their competitive positions, establishing Hong Kong's trajectory as a worldwide innovation powerhouse.

treasureGlobalPartnership.title: Mezzofy Partners with Treasure Global to Accelerate Digital Coupon Expansion in Malaysia

paragraphs.opening: Mezzofy announced a strategic partnership with Treasure Global Inc., designating them as the exclusive distributor of its digital coupon platform in Malaysia.
paragraphs.positioning: The company positions itself as a regional leader managing over USD40 billion in digital coupon transactions across 15 markets. Its "Coupon-as-a-Service (CaaS)" platform enables businesses to engage customers without requiring new infrastructure investments.
paragraphs.collaboration: Through this collaboration, Treasure Global will expand platform adoption throughout Malaysia, leveraging their local market expertise and digital capabilities. The partners project achieving "USD2 to 4 million in recurring annual revenue"
paragraphs.platform: The platform provides features including seamless coupon creation, real-time redemption tracking, and campaign analytics. The partnership reflects Mezzofy's commitment to supporting Malaysian brands in leveraging digital innovation for customer engagement as the nation advances its digital economy.

quote.text: "Treasure Global's strong presence and market insight make them a great partner to scale our solution in Malaysia."

ejtech300mCoupons.title: EJTech Highlights: Mezzofy's Cloud Platform Distributes 300M Digital Coupons Across APAC

paragraphs.recognition: Mezzofy's cloud platform for digital coupons received recognition from EJTech for its transformation of customer engagement across the Asia-Pacific region.
paragraphs.platform: The platform enables businesses to "create and distribute eco-friendly, paperless coupons efficiently, tapping into a wide range of industries." The solution supports direct customer outreach via email, SMS, and social media channels while reducing paper consumption.
paragraphs.scale: According to EJTech, "With over 300 million digital coupons already distributed," Mezzofy demonstrates significant market traction in reshaping how companies connect with consumers sustainably and cost-effectively.
paragraphs.milestone: This milestone represents a major achievement in the digital transformation of promotional marketing across the Asia-Pacific region. The platform's ability to handle such massive scale while maintaining efficiency and eco-friendliness sets a new standard for the industry.

partners.issue2: Wallet app login or sync issues
partners.issue3: NFC tap not recognized at point of sale
partners.issue4: Coupon expired or terms not as expected

sla.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
sla.description: Our commitment to response and resolution times across all support tiers.
sla.hosting: Hosted on AWS (Singapore region) — 99.9% uptime SLA
sla.disclaimer: SLA timers begin upon ticket acknowledgement. Resolution times are targets, not guarantees, and may vary for issues requiring third-party involvement. Support hours are based on Singapore Time (SGT, UTC+8).

process.title: Ticket Process
process.description: What happens after you submit a support request.

step1.title: Submit
step1.desc: Submit your request via the Merchant Portal, Partner Portal, or email. Include your account ID, a clear description, and any screenshots or logs.

step2.title: Acknowledge
step2.desc: Our team acknowledges your ticket within the SLA response time and assigns a case reference number for tracking.

step3.title: Investigate & Update
step3.desc: Our engineers investigate the issue and provide regular updates. You will be notified at each status change via email or portal notification.

step4.title: Resolve
step4.desc: Once resolved, we provide a full resolution summary and confirm closure with you. You can reopen the ticket within 7 days if the issue recurs.

escalation.title: Still need help? Reach out to us directly.

aiChat.title: Mezzofy Support Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Get instant answers to common questions or submit a support ticket.

footerCta.title: Ready to Get Support?
footerCta.description: Our team is available 24/7 to help you resolve any issues with the Mezzofy platform.

hero.title: Page Not Found
hero.description: Sorry, the page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.
